'''DFS-1015''' was one of the [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class starfighter]] assigned to [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']] during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Blockade of Naboo]].
